claims.summary: `ExperienceDeltaKindV1` can hide simultaneous shifts because a single enum value cannot fully name compress/gate/complex/cascade texture.
`SpectralDimensionV1.effective_dimension` should be used when a felt shift spans a gradient rather than a single integer dimension.
Increasing `RESONANCE_STABILITY_FOOTHOLD_WEIGHT` may help if restless high-entropy shadow texture persists.
